title: Funny Deaths
description: Adds Custom funny death messages when player Dies! Make game extra fun
body:
Are you tired of seeing the same boring **"Player was slain by Zombie"** messages? Want to add some extra fun and laughter to your Minecraft server? Then the **Funny Death Plugin** is exactly what you need!

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfd8aa979c91cf031a70a75658cba7bb347760b7.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)

## What is the Funny Death Plugin?

The **Funny Death Plugin** is a simple yet entertaining plugin that adds **150+ custom funny death messages** whenever a player dies in Minecraft. Instead of the usual serious messages, your chat will be filled with hilarious and creative notifications, making every death a moment to enjoy! 🤣

## Features of Funny Death Plugin

- ✅ **Custom Death Messages** – Replace default death messages with funny and creative texts.
- ✅ **Supports All Death Types** – Works for falls, explosions, mob attacks, drowning, and more!
- ✅ **Lightweight & Lag-Free** – No impact on server performance.
- ✅ **Perfect for SMPs & Mini-Games** – Adds fun to any type of server.

## Examples of Funny Death Messages

Here are some hilarious death messages that this plugin can generate:

- **"Steve thought he could fly… He was wrong!"**
- **"Alex tried to hug a Creeper. Bad idea!"**
- **"Player forgot that lava is not a hot tub."**
- **"Oof! Gravity is NOT your friend."**
- **"Bob fought the Ender Dragon… And lost. RIP."**

## Why You Should Use This Plugin

Minecraft is fun, but adding humor makes it even better! Whether you're running an **SMP**, a **PvP server**, or just playing with friends, this plugin will bring a lot of **laughs and entertainment**. Every death becomes a meme-worthy moment! 😂
